channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Over a dozen Dems demand Trump admin protect Iranians living in the US
item.description: Democratic lawmakers urge protection for Iranians in the U.S. unable to safely return home.

item.title: Democrat Beyer blasts GOP plan to counter Virginia redistricting by eliminating his seat
item.description: GOP plan would give Arlington and Alexandria to D.C., eliminating Beyer's seat.

item.title: Curses, Foiled Again: The FBI Thwarts a Potential Terror Plot Directed at a Texas Synagogue
Trump admin steps up next phase of effort to protect children's health
item.description: EPA targets childhood lead poisoning with reallocated funds and new awareness tools.

item.title: Rep. John Rose to Newsmax: Pass DHS Bill Before Trump Measures Expire
item.description: House Republicans urged to pass DHS funding bill before emergency measures expire.
